seoTitle: Hendon vs Henley Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hendon and Henley Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hendon vs Henley Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hendon and Henley Beach.
heading: Hendon vs Henley Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hendon, South Australia and Henley Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hendon has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Henley Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hendon or Henley Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hendon has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Henley Beach scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hendon scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Henley Beach scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hendon or Henley Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hendon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
